      "studio": "Fillabrona",
      "portfolioUrl": "https://fillabrona.github.io"
    },
    "url": "https://impostiq.github.io",
    "description": "A social deduction party game similar to Spyfall. Players receive a secret word, but the Imposter receives nothing. Players must question each other to find the spy without revealing the word. Features Online and Local device play.",
    "discordUrl": "https://discord.gg/m9WrJxGKtr",

    "playerRequirements": {
      "minPlayers": 3,
      "maxPlayers": "Unlimited, but UI is optimized for large groups.",
      "specialThresholds": "Lobbies with 10 or more players unlock the 'Second Imposter / Fake Card' setting."
    }
  },
  "ui_and_design": {
    "theme": "Dark mode with glassmorphism (translucent panels with blur). Primary background is a deep slate (#020617). Accent colors are primarily brand purple/violet (#8b5cf6), with conditional UI colors (Teal for Agents, Red for Imposter, Yellow for Fake Word).",

      "halloween": {

      "topLeft": "Discord community link button. Download Android App (APK) button (only visible on Android devices not using the app wrapper)."
    }
  },
  "howToPlay": {
    "primaryObjective": "A battle of wits and deception. Agents must identify the Imposter (or player with the fake word), while the rogue player tries to survive without being caught.",
    "setup": {
      "description": "Each player receives a role: Agents get the secret word, the Imposter gets nothing (Classic) or a different word (Fake Word Mode).",
      "tip": "Long-press a category during setup to see example words."
    },
    "gameplay": {
      "turnStructure": [
        "State a Fact: Each player describes the word without saying it.",
        "Ask a Question: Players ask the next player in order a related question."
      ],
      "strategies": {
        "agents": "Be specific, not obvious. Use clues like 'fin' or 'predator' for 'Shark'. Watch for hesitation; Imposters might need time to invent answers. Listen to all clues to see if one feels out of place.",
        "imposter": "Listen and adapt. Use initial clues to build a theory and blend in. Start with general clues and become more specific as you gain confidence.",
        "fakeWordPlayer": "If everyone's clues point to a different word, you might have the fake word. Use general clues that fit both. Act confident."
      },
      "wordCheckFeature": {
        "description": "If an Agent doesn't recognize the secret word, they can click 'I don't recognize this word' on the reveal screen. This triggers a secret poll for Agents.",
        "outcome": "If a majority of Agents vote they are confused, the round immediately restarts and a new word/imposter is dealt. This ensures fairness given the 8500+ word bank."
      }
    },
    "voting_and_results": {
      "onlineMode": "Players get an interactive Voting Screen UI on their own devices to secretly select the avatar of their suspect. The game calculates the winner: Agents win if the majority votes correctly. The Imposter/Fake Word player wins on a tie or incorrect vote.",
      "localMode": "There is NO in-game voting UI for suspects. Players discuss and vote out loud in real life. When the group agrees, the host clicks 'Identify Imposter' and the game simply skips to a reveal screen showing who the rogue player actually was."
    }
  },
  "gameModes": [
    {
      "id": "online",
      "name": "Play Online",
      "description": "Join or create private lobbies to play with friends over the internet.",
      "exclusiveFeatures": {
        "categoryVoting": "Unlike Local Mode where the host chooses, in Online Mode, all players cast a vote for the category. The category with the most votes wins. Ties are resolved randomly.",
        "votingRecord": "At the end of the game, a detailed Voting Record screen shows exactly who voted for whom."
      },
      "flow": {
        "creation": [
          "Click 'Play Online' from the main menu.",
          "Click 'Switch to Create Mission'.",
          "Enter a username (max 25 chars).",
          "Click 'Create Lobby'.",
          "Share the generated 6-char Lobby ID, 4-char Password, deep link, or dynamic QR Code with friends."
        ],
        "joining": [
          "Enter Lobby ID, Password, and Username, then click 'Join Lobby'.",
          "Alternatively, scan the QR code provided by the host.",
          "Alternatively, click a shared invite link (auto-fills Lobby ID and Password)."
        ],
        "waitingRoom": "Host can change game settings, remove players, and click 'START MISSION'. Guests can view settings, share invites, and vote for a category. Must wait for host to start.",
        "cardReveal": "Shows a 3D 'TOP SECRET' locked card. Tapping flips it to show the role/word.",
        "activeGame": "Displays circular countdown timer. Players can individually click 'Vote to End Round'. If a majority vote to end, the timer stops early.",
        "voting": "Interactive UI where players select the avatar(s) of who they suspect.",
        "results": "Calculates and displays the winner, accused player, Secret Word, Fake Word (if applicable), and a Voting Record."
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "local",
      "name": "Play on This Device",
      "description": "Play with friends using a single device passed around the room.",
      "exclusiveFeatures": {
        "customVoiceNotes": "ONLY available in Local Mode. Before adding a player, the host can tap the microphone icon to record a short audio clip. This clip plays when the device is handed to that player, telling them it's their turn."
      },
      "flow": {
        "setup": "Host adds player names (minimum 3). Host manually selects the category (no voting). Host adjusts settings and clicks 'Start Mission'.",
        "handoverScreen": "Shows 'Pass the device to [Player Name]'. Player clicks 'Verify Identity' to view their card secretly. Plays custom recorded voice note if one was set.",
        "activeGame": "Displays countdown timer or 'Untimed' infinity icon. Players talk in real life. When the real-life discussion is done, host clicks 'Identify Imposter'.",
        "results": "Directly reveals who the Imposter/Fake Word player was, since all voting was handled verbally in the real world."
      }
    }
  ],
  "settings_and_requirements": {
    "isFakeWordMode": {
      "name": "Fake Word Mode",
      "description": "Replaces the Imposter with a Fake Word Player. One Agent receives a slightly different word from the same category. They don't know their word is fake.",
      "requirements": "None."
    },
    "enableTwoImposters": {
      "name": "Second Imposter / Second Fake Card",
      "description": "Adds a second rogue player to the game.",
      "requirements": "Strictly requires 10 or more players in the lobby. If 'Fake Word Mode' is also enabled, this adds a second Fake Word Player instead of an Imposter."
    },
    "notifyImposterOnVote": {
      "name": "Notify Imposter on Vote",
      "description": "If enabled, the Imposter receives a secret popup warning if an Agent triggers a 'Word Check' confusion poll.",
      "requirements": "Automatically disabled if 'Fake Word Mode' is turned on."
    },
    "speakCategory": {
      "name": "Speak Category",

      "name": "Countdown Timer",
      "description": "Sets discussion time from 1 to 15 minutes. Can be toggled completely off for Untimed Mode.",
      "requirements": "None."
    }
  },
  "categories": {
    "description": "Determines the theme of the secret word. The game has 8500+ words across these categories.",

    "previewFeature": "In either mode, press and hold (long-press) any category card to open an info modal showing example words from that category.",

  "gameplay_tips": [
    "The Imposter doesn't know the secret word. Ask questions that might expose them!",
    "Pay attention to hesitation. The Imposter might need extra time to think of a lie.",
    "Try to ask a question only a true agent would know the answer to.",
    "The first player on the turn order list asks the first question.",
    "Innocent agents should try to prove they know the word without giving it away.",
    "Random Mode chooses a category from the entire word bank for an extra challenge.",
    "You can record your own 'It's your turn!' voice note by tapping the microphone icon when adding a player in local mode.",
    "Use the 'Untimed' mode for a more relaxed, deduction-focused game.",
    "In Online Mode, check the 'Voting Record' at the end to see who betrayed whom.",
    "If the group is confused, the Imposter often wins. Keep your questions clear.",
    "Press and hold any category card during setup to sneak a peek at some example words!",
    "If a 'Word Check' poll appears, vote honestly. Rerolling a confusing word gives the Agents a better chance to win.",
    "If the game seems to pause after cards are dealt in online mode, a secret 'Word Check' poll is likely in progress. Imposters, use this time to prepare your cover story!",
    "Tip for Fake Word mode: If someone gives a clue that is confidently wrong, they might have the fake word. Don't dismiss them as just a bad player!",
    "When two Imposters are in play, they don't know each other's identity. Be careful not to accidentally vote for your fellow spy!",
    "If a round suddenly restarts before it begins, it means a majority of Agents were confused by the secret word and voted to re-deal."
  ]
}
